info.name: Microsoft Azure Guest Diagnostic Settings API
info.description: API to Add/Remove/List Guest Diagnostics Configuration to Azure Resources

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettings Diagnosticsettingsname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the diagnostic setting.

request.description: Creates or updates guest diagnostics settings.

response.name: An existing guest diagnostic settings was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: A new guest diagnostic settings was successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the guest diagnostic settings could not be created or updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettings Diagnosticsettingsname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the diagnostic setting.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the diagnostic settings could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettings Diagnosticsettingsname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the diagnostic setting.

response.name: An existing guest diagnostic settings was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: A new guest diagnostic settings was successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the guest diagnostic settings could not be created or updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettings Diagnosticsettingsname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the diagnostic setting.

response.name: The diagnostic settings was successfully deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The diagnostic settings does not exist. It may have already been deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the diagnostic settings could not be deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettings

request.description: Get a list of all guest diagnostic settings in a subscription.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the list of guest diagnostic settings could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettings

request.description: Get a list of all guest diagnostic settings in a resource group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the list of guest diagnostic settings could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
